data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture to improve scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Each component of the application is an independent service that communicates over HTTP/REST or gRPC.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: WhatsApp messages are secured with end-to-end encryption in the architecture.
data.technical_spec: Uses Signal Protocol for encryption, ensuring only communicating users can read messages.

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Reliance on distributed computing to ensure high availability and reliability across multiple regions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes data replication and partitioning across server clusters.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Database sharding is used to manage massive user data loads.
data.technical_spec: Employs automatic sharding to distribute data efficiently across servers.

data.title: Global Load Balancing
data.description: Load balancing is implemented to manage traffic between servers and optimize resource use.
data.technical_spec: Uses DNS-based and appliance-based load balancing techniques.
